description: Six notes rotating through a scale with delay echo, reverb, and an SMR-style LED ring around the button. Inspired by magicrainbowfairydust.com and Andrew Huang's Spectral Multiband Resonator patch. Randomizes notes, tempo, delay time, reverse echo, reverb amount, and tone — different every time.

versions.changes: Initial release: SMR-style 6-note clusters rotating through scales, delay echo (with reverse mode + tone control), 3-band EQ for both main and delay, convolution reverb, LED ring visualization around arcade button, particle effects, hold mode, randomize-all, localStorage favorites with naming, synthy dark CRT aesthetic.
